name: bug_fix_sliding_window
prompt: Read sliding_window.py. There's a bug — running it gives [3, 3, 5, 5, 6] but the correct sliding-window-max for k=3 is [3, 3, 5, 5, 6, 7]. Fix it.

name: new_file_from_spec
prompt: Create a Python CLI tool word_freq.py in the current directory. Spec: reads stdin or a file argument, outputs the top N most common words (default N=10) one per line in 'count<TAB>word' format, lowercase, only [a-z]+ tokens. Use argparse for the file and -n flags. No external dependencies.

verify.command: echo 'the the the cat dog dog' | python3 word_freq.py -n 2

name: cross_file_refactor
prompt: Refactor: extract format_user_record (and only that function) from utils.py into a new file users.py. Update service.py to import format_user_record from users instead of utils. Leave shout in utils.py. Don't change behavior.
